# Why flows?

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="49%"}
![](images/slide_why_flows/HIV-deaths-2023){width="100%"}

::: {style="font-size:0.62rem; color:#aaa;"}
[Our World in Data](https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/number-of-deaths-from-hivaids?time=earliest..2023)

:::
:::
::: {.column width="49%"}
![](images/slide_why_flows/Monod_1.png){width="100%"}

![](images/slide_why_flows/Monod_2.png){width="75%"}

::: {style="font-size:0.62rem; color:#aaa;"}
[Monod et al Nature Microbiology 2023](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41564-023-01530-8)
:::
:::
:::
